description: Huly MCP: feature-complete MCP server for Huly integration
name: io.github.dearlordylord/huly-mcp

environmentVariables.description: Reachable self-hosted or replacement hosted Huly API URL
environmentVariables.name: HULY_URL

environmentVariables.description: Connection timeout in milliseconds. Omit to use the package default.
environmentVariables.name: HULY_CONNECTION_TIMEOUT

environmentVariables.description: Tool exposure mode: auto (default), native, or proxy. Auto keeps exact claude-code native and resolves Codex, Cursor, Windsurf, Copilot, opencode, Claude AI, and unknown clients to proxy mode.
environmentVariables.name: HULY_TOOL_MODE

environmentVariables.description: Set true to make active TOOLSETS / TOOLS a hard allow-list for proxy search, schema lookup, and invocation. Defaults to false.
environmentVariables.name: PROXY_OUTPUT_STRICT

environmentVariables.description: Comma-separated native Huly tool categories to expose, such as issues,projects,search. If unset with TOOLS, all native tools are exposed.
environmentVariables.name: TOOLSETS

environmentVariables.description: Comma-separated exact native Huly tool names to expose in addition to selected TOOLSETS, such as list_documents,create_issue.
environmentVariables.name: TOOLS

title: Huly MCP
